name: TC-01: Admin Login with Valid Credentials
description: Admin login with valid email and password directs the user to the monitoring dashboard.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page at /login
Type admin@suryaelektrik.com in the email input field
Type password123 in the password input field
Click the Masuk ke Sistem button
Verify the URL changes to the root path / and the dashboard layout renders
Verify the dashboard header text shows DASBOR PEMANTAUAN
